title: Why the lipstick
wikitext:
[]: Why the lipstick             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Apr 28, 2015 4:41 pm This puzzled me greatly when I saw the final episode. Out of everything in this final scene, why the lipstick? I mean, we've never seen Maya wear some before so it puzzles me she is here. Well, other than it makes her look pretty, I guess? Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Tue Apr 28, 2015 5:45 pm Maybe she was making out with Ritsuko in her instrumentality session and Ritsuko's lipstick got smudged onto her lips? The only other reasons I can think of are: It symbolizes her getting more in touch with her feminine side (maybe as a result of instrumentality). Or, she just felt like doing something different.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Apr 28, 2015 8:41 pm So the audience doesn't get confused and think Shinji is congratulating himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Apr 28, 2015 8:47 pm I still think people could tell that's Maya. She does have longer hair than Shinji and the Nerv uniform. Shinji does not.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Apr 29, 2015 3:43 am The lipstick is visible very briefly and seems to go away when she speaks - which strongly suggests animation error. There are instances of female characters losing or gaining lipstick, like Ritsuko in Episode 02.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Apr 29, 2015 5:32 am Is there any other occasion, where Maya's wearing lipstic? Just cucurious, because I can't recall any.

[]:             Quote Post by Bryan » Wed Apr 29, 2015 6:57 am I find make-up in general very puzzling. It's not that I don't see the appeal, but I just would have thought some people would have found it too inauthentic and yet they don't.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Apr 29, 2015 9:48 am I don't ever recall seeing Maya with lipstick either. The only character who consistently has lipstick as part of her design is Ritsuko, although Misato wears lipstick in Episode 07 when she's dressed up for the Jet Alone event. For Maya to have lipstick in just one scene - and barely noticeable at that - really has me thinking off-character/coloring error. Or maybe she just imagined herself wearing lipstick for instrumentality? Who knows? Bryan wrote: I find make-up in general very puzzling. It's not that I don't see the appeal, but I just would have thought some people would have found it too inauthentic and yet they don't.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 29, 2015 9:53 am The cel used is from the OP. I wouldn't read that much into it.

[]: Re: Why the lipstick             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 29, 2015 11:05 am xPearse wrote: This puzzled me greatly when I saw the final episode. Out of everything in this final scene, why the lipstick? I mean, we've never seen Maya wear some before so it puzzles me she is here. Well, other than it makes her look pretty, I guess? Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Apr 29, 2015 3:01 pm Reichu wrote: The cel used is from the OP. I wouldn't read that much into it.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed Apr 29, 2015 6:55 pm robersora wrote: Oooh~... Well, considering how haphazardly the last Episodes are put together, it makes sense like for them to use cells from the opening. And here I was, thinking that we would solve another big mystery of Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 29, 2015 9:35 pm xPearse wrote: Still, I wanted some other thoughts on it. I guess we can call the tread complete, unless we want to debate why the choice of pink lipstick now, do we?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Thu Apr 30, 2015 6:35 am Guy Nacks wrote: Pink is the most subdued color of lipstick; it fits in with Maya's subdued nature. It wouldn't fit her personality to color her lips a sultry red or devious mahogany.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Apr 30, 2015 8:11 am I’ve tried a couple times to post something constructive, but all I can come up with is a quip about needing to wipe that lipstick off my face at some point. I’m not sure if I’m disappointed in myself, or in trying to reach a conclusion other than “inconsistency in animation.” Maybe it’s just there to make her look happier in 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Apr 30, 2015 9:22 am Question: Why the lipstick? Answer: Why not? Side Note: Maya is the hottest of all the Eva characters. (Sakura Suzuhara is the cutest though. I hope Maya's like her mentor)

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Apr 30, 2015 9:25 am ^ Best answers, all around.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Apr 30, 2015 11:12 am Agreed. Of all the characters in NGE, Maya is probably the most date-able. Hopefully she swings both ways.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Apr 30, 2015 2:56 pm Rejection from Maya would break my poor little fragile heart. :(

I mean, we've never seen Maya wear some before so it puzzles me she is here. Well, other than it makes her look pretty, I guess? Thoughts?
